query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: Ridged cylindrical electrical insulators clamped to parallel metal transmission cables that run diagonally across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Ridged cylindrical electrical insulators clamped to parallel metal transmission cables running diagonally across the frame are overwhelmed by intentional digital artifacts and severe color banding, producing diagonal stripes of saturated blue, yellow, and orange that alias across the cables and dark backdrop, dissolving surface detail into a glitch-like pattern.
